/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/comal-ide_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/main_window.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/code_editor_panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/comal_lsp_client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/direct_command_panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/graphics_panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/debug_panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/file_browser_panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/help_panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/qt_io.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/run_worker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/qsci_lexer_comal.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-ide.dir/src/settings_dialog.cpp.o" -o comal-ide  /usr/lib64/libQt6PrintSupport.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Svg.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libqscintilla2_qt6.so ../libcomal-runtime/libcomal-runtime.a ../libcomal-graphics/libcomal-graphics.a /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.3 ../libcomal-parser/libcomal-parser.a ../libcomal-sound/libcomal-sound.a -lfluidsynth /usr/lib64/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.3
